---
title: "Coloration in different areas of facial skin is a cue to health: The role of cheek redness and periorbital luminance in health perception"
authors: "Jones, A. L., Porcheron, A., Sweda, J., Morizot, F., & Russell, R."
year: 2016
date: 2016-01-01
pub-journal: "Body Image"
volume: "17"
pages: "57–66"
doi: "10.1016/j.bodyim.2016.02.001"
pdf: "assets/papers/2016/jones_etal_2016.pdf"
categories: [first-impressions]
---
